title: COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM - 211info
text: CENTER FOR HUMAN DEVELOPMENT COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a range of support services to individuals experiencing intellectual and/or developmental disabilities. Services can include case management; individual and family support plans; access to brokerage services for transportation; in-home supports or residential placement; and employment and vocational services. 2301 Cove Avenue La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Individuals with an intellectual or developmental disability. Applicant must be an Oregon resident and a U.S. citizen. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 962-8800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 962-8800 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of citizenship, proof of address, and records of any/all psychological and medical assessments related to the disability. AREA SERVED: Union County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8-5:30pm Services: Benefits and Services Assistance * Disabilities Issues Case/Care Management * Disabilities Issues Disability Related Center Based Employment Disability Related Parenting Programs Disability Related Transportation Home/Community Based Developmental Disabilities Programs Residential Placement Services for People with Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
